prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='CWT_catboost', seasonality_champion='CWT_svr', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: The validation folds show mixed trend directions (up then down) with significant model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.57) and high seasonality variance (0.58). CWT_catboost best tracks trends, while CWT_svr captures seasonal patterns. The top performers are ONLY_CWT_rf, rf, and ONLY_DWT_rf in tier1. Given the high disagreement and seasonality variance, DBA combination is recommended to leverage model diversity without overfitting to any single pattern.

Given the high disagreement and seasonality variance, DBA combination is recommended to leverage model diversity without overfitting to any single pattern."

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: The validation folds show mixed trend directions (up then down) with significant model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.57) and high seasonality variance (0.58). CWT_catboost best tracks trends, while CWT_svr captures seasonal patterns. The top performers are ONLY_CWT_rf, rf, and ONLY_DWT_rf in tier1. Given the high disagreement and seasonality variance, DBA combination is recommended to leverage model diversity without overfitting to any single pattern.

proposer.rationale: n_unique_winners=7 indicates high model heterogeneity requiring top-k selection over single best. relative_spread_mean=0.201 shows moderate disagreement (below 0.25 threshold). RMSE spread_ratio=0.5668 suggests significant gap between best/worst models, favoring inverse_rmse_weights with shrinkage. n_windows=3 is very small, so top_k=3 and shrinkage=0.25 provide stability. Pattern analyst recommends dba_combination for high seasonality_variance (0.5799) and mixed trend directions. direction_focus preset selected due to avg POCID=41.0 < 45.
